requirements.text: WebSocket endpoint at /ws/tps in FastAPI app
requirements.acceptance: Client can connect and receive JSON messages
Tracks N clients, broadcasts to all, handles drops

requirements.text: Broadcast TPS snapshot on each hook call
requirements.acceptance: Every _on_post_api_request triggers broadcast to all clients

requirements.text: JSON message format with type field
requirements.acceptance: Messages are valid JSON with type: tps_update
Concurrent hook calls dont corrupt client set
Client disconnect doesnt crash server or leak resources
Unit tests for connect, disconnect, broadcast, error handling
Integration test: connect, receive message, disconnect
All existing tests pass without modification
Client can subscribe to specific session_id
Dead connections are detected and removed
Slow clients dont cause memory buildup

success_criteria: Client can connect to ws://host:port/ws/tps and receive JSON TPS updates
Multiple concurrent clients receive the same broadcast
Client disconnect doesnt crash the server
All existing tests pass: pytest tests/ -x
New WebSocket tests pass: pytest tests/test_websocket.py -x
Thread-safe: concurrent hook calls with multiple clients dont corrupt state
